mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNLOGINHIST ( HIST_ID, USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_SE, LOGIN_RESULT, LOGIN_IP, LOGIN_MESSAGE, LOGIN_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{histId}, #{userId}, #{userNm}, #{userSe}, #{loginResult}, #{loginIp}, #{loginMessage}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

where.if: AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(USER_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(USER_NM, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(LOGIN_IP, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

AND LOGIN_RESULT = 'FAIL' AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '')) LIKE '%lock%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '')) LIKE '%block%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '')) LIKE '%refused%' OR COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '') LIKE '%잠%' OR COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '') LIKE '%차단%' OR COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '') LIKE '%거부%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT HIST_ID AS histId, USER_ID AS userId, USER_NM AS userNm, USER_SE AS userSe, LOGIN_RESULT AS loginResult, LOGIN_IP AS loginIp, COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '') AS loginMessage, TO_CHAR(LOGIN_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS loginPnttm FROM COMTNLOGINHIST
ORDER BY LOGIN_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
